/usr/bin/ar qc libimgui_lib.a CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/imgui_lib.dir/imgui/imgui-SFML.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgui_lib.a
